name: MAHER, COMMISSIONER OF SOCIAL SERVICES OF CONNECTICUT v. DOE et al.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in MAHER, COMMISSIONER OF SOCIAL SERVICES OF CONNECTICUT v. DOE et al. (432 U.S. 526, 1976 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
